SEARCH
Package com.emi.infracore.spring

Class InfraCoreAutoConfiguration

java.lang.Object
com.emi.infracore.spring.InfraCoreAutoConfiguration
@AutoConfiguration @ConditionalOnClass({org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate.class,com.emi.infracore.factory.InfraCoreFactory.class}) public class InfraCoreAutoConfiguration extends Object
Spring Boot auto-configuration for infra-core components. This configuration: - Creates RedisTemplate beans with proper serialization - Sets up all infra-core store implementations - Only activates if infra-core is on the classpath - Can be overridden with custom beans Usage: Just add infra-spring-boot dependency. Automatic!

  • Method Details

    • infraCoreRedisTemplate

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean public org.springframework.data.redis.core.RedisTemplate<String,Object> infraCoreRedisTemplate(org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisConnectionFactory factory)
      Create and configure RedisTemplate for object operations. Delegates to Spring Boot's auto-configuration but adds our serialization.

    • infraCoreStringRedisTemplate

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean public org.springframework.data.redis.core.StringRedisTemplate infraCoreStringRedisTemplate(org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisConnectionFactory factory)
      Create StringRedisTemplate for string-based operations (like stock management). Spring Boot auto-provides this, but we make it explicit.

    • keyBuilder

      @Bean @ConditionalOnMissingBean public KeyBuilder keyBuilder()
      Create KeyBuilder utility bean.

      Create RateLimiter store bean.
